name: Aegislash
flavor: Once upon a time, a king with an Aegislash reigned over the land. His Pokémon eventually drained him of life, and his kingdom fell with him.

ability.name: Cursed Metal
ability.effect: Attacks used by your [Psychic] Pokémon and [Metal] Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
